title: Rebecca Hockman’s CV
text:
Business analytics major with a proven track record of driving operational efficiency and performance improvement in customer service and internal solutions environments. Currently serving as CC solutions Team team lead, known for leveraging data-driven strategies to enhance team productivity, develop training protocols, and support cross-functional collaboration

Linkedin | Email





January 2024 - Present Rexburg, Idaho
Delivered rapid and effective internal solutions for customer service inquiries, consistently maintaining a scorecard rating of 80+ across all performance categories Recognized as star performer and top of Team scorecard for July 2025 Averaged 16 tasks per hour over last 4 months versus the goal of 12, demonstrating sustained productivity and time management in a high volume environment Trained 2 new employees while providing ongoing coaching and feedback to whole team to elevate service standards Authored and refined Standard Operating Procedures and created a task tracker on excel to give feedback on efficiency in real time Acquired focused understanding of the compensation plan, policies, and connection with Marketing executives, tested and passed panel with Business Development on 8/21/2025



July 2024 - January 2025 Rexburg, Idaho
Delivered prompt, tailored solutions to customer inquiries, optimizing satisfaction, and growing members globally to maintain and improve on the company wide 97% retention rate Achieved top performer on new employee scorecard, reflecting excellence in service quality, responsiveness and adherence to Key Performance indicators Utilized resources such as the customer improvement message board and policy updates to tailor communication to each customer and recognize solutions to trends Sustained a minimum of 18 marketing service transfers per month



January 2020 - February 2024 Glendale, Arizona
Communicated with customers to manage and respond to negative customer reviews, implementing feedback and maintaining a 100% customer satisfaction score Reduced weekday labor costs from 15% to a consistent 8%, leveraging real-time scheduling adjustments and task-based labor modeling to optimize workforce efficiency Conducted structured interviews and performance evaluations to identify high-potential employees for promotion and wage increases, aligning development with operational goals Led training and development for new hires and prospective management candidates, including full onboarding and performance coaching for the January 2024 management team





Intermediate SQL for managing large databases and Information
Advanced excel for spreadsheet analysis including VBA
Creative problem solving capabilities
R Studio for analytics using QMD to HTML
Organization and Communication in and out of the workplace
Efficiency in both Independant and Cooperative work
VS Code Programming in Python and QMD to HTML and Github
66 Words Per minute Typing Speed




September 2020 - December 2026 (Anticipated) Brigham Young University Idaho
1667 - death Trinity College, Cambridge



Designed and coded a relational SQL database with over 600 data entries, writing complex queries to extract, filter, and analyze information across multiple use cases Performed complex analytical studies and managed large, complex datasets using Quarto, Python and SQL Developed professional excel rep orts for quick and automated referencing and analysis of business reports Completed financial and managerial accounting coursework, applying core principles to analyze financial data, develop budgets, and support business decision-making in practical assignments Interpreted and created financial statements including balance sheets and income reports, applying accounting principles to assess business performance and guide decision making
